## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass in CI
- [ ] `ruff check app/` is clean
- [ ] `tsc --noEmit` exits 0
- [ ] No new secrets committed (checked by Gitleaks)
- [ ] Documentation updated (if behaviour changed)
- [ ] `RELEASE_NOTES.md` updated (if user-facing change)
- [ ] Breaking changes documented in `docs/MIGRATION_PLAYBOOK.md`
